title: Release v0.1.33: README badges commit, tag, push, host onboarding
action: Commit the CLI-generated README badge refresh (bee_backlog badges --write output, already in the working tree); tag v0.1.33 at HEAD; push the branch and tags to origin; then onboard the anphabe host repos (all except anphabe-crm) with the onboarding script and commit each host's vendored changes pathspec-scoped, per the recorded release flow.

truths: Tag v0.1.33 exists at the close-out HEAD and is pushed
README badge counts match the backlog (24 done / 1 in-flight / 3 proposed)

verify: git tag -l v0.1.33 | grep -q v0.1.33 && grep -q 'backlog%20done-24' README.md

trace.outcome: v0.1.33 released: badges commit 0eb4b03 pushed with tag v0.1.33; 8 anphabe hosts onboarded (recheck up_to_date each) with pathspec-scoped commits; anphabe-crm excluded per standing rule
trace.verify_output: exit 0 (tag present at pushed HEAD; badge counts 24/1/3 match backlog)
trace.verify_command: git tag -l v0.1.33 | grep -q v0.1.33 && grep -q 'backlog%20done-24' README.md
